rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY GILLIHAN VS. JAIME CARRILLO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Monday, January 26,2015. Line 4. DEFENDANT JAIME CARRILLO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges an unlawful detainer. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff must have used Ellis Act provision to terminate Defendant's tenancy. =(501/REQ)
